info.name: 48. Use Case - Sertifikat Medis Penyebab Kematian (SMPK)
info.description:
For **complete repository for all SATUSEHAT use-cases** please access our public workspaces : [Postman Workspaces](https://s.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT)

For **detailed SATUSEHAT use-cases import link** please see : [Postman Public Kemkes Link](https://link.kemkes.go.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT)

For **interoperability guidance** please see : [Panduan Interoperabilitas](https://satusehat.kemkes.go.id/platform/docs/id/interoperability/)

Any information about SATUSEHAT FHIR Profile could be accessed through [Simplifier FHIR Profile](https://simplifier.net/guide/SATUSEHAT-FHIR-R4-Implementation-Guide/Home/FHIRProfiles?version=current)

For further explanation please consult to training presentation [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1y9Uzc6rx6ffXn-W3e-RhnoMxzjuwCR71/view?usp=sharing)

| **Tanggal** | **Riwayat Perubahan** | **Penanggung Jawab** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 10 Nov 2025 | Versi 1 | Anisatul 'Afifah |
| 24 Nov 2025 | Versi 2 - Penambahan PATCH Observation Data Medis Penyebab Kematian oleh Tim Central Koder Kemenkes dan GET Observation tersebut oleh Fasyankes | Anisatul 'Afifah |
| 17 Des 2025 | Versi 3 - Penambahan variabel Apakah Dead on Arrival (Observation) | Anisatul 'Afifah |
